title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services family as a Frontend Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services:
Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health Holdings Services!
